design_philosophy.archetype: The Performance Pro (Modified for Nightlife Luxury)
core_principles: Motion as Texture (Slow drifts, smooth scrolls)

rules: NO purple, teal, or blue gradients.
Use Gold (#C5A572) for CTAs, borders, and accents only.
Text should be White or Off-White (#E5E5E5) for readability.

images.name: vid.mp4
images.usage: Optional: Hero Background Video replacement or 'Vibe' section

Hero.structure: Full-screen (h-screen) with amb.jpg as background. Overlay: bg-black/60. Content: Center aligned. Logo large.
Hero.animation: Fade in logo. Parallax on background image.

MovingGallery.style: Infinite horizontal scroll of images (height: 400px). Grayscale on default, Full color on hover.

MenuGrid.interaction: Click to open Lightbox/Modal for better readability.

BookingCTA.style: Fixed bottom-right floating button OR Main Nav button.
BookingCTA.color: bg-gold text-black hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300
BookingCTA.label: RESERVE TABLE

preferences.reveal: Elements fade in + move up (y: 20 -> 0) on scroll.

universal_guidelines: Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling. Standard scroll feels cheap.
Do not use gradients. Use solid colors and borders.
Ensure all text is legible against black backgrounds (min contrast 4.5:1).
Use 'Playfair Display' for all headings to establish luxury.
Gold (#C5A572) is the ONLY accent color.
Images must have 'object-cover' and proper aspect ratios.
Forms must use Shadcn components but styled with Gold borders.
Interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config to include the custom 'gold' color and 'Playfair Display' font.
3. Implement 'Lenis' smooth scroll in the root layout.
4. Create the 'MovingGallery' component using the gallery images.
5. Build the Menu page as a gallery of menu images.
6. Ensure the Booking link opens in a new tab.
7. STRICTLY follow the Black & Gold theme. No other colors.
